title: Slack x Monday workflow not working

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Whenever we try to build a workflow on slack that will create a monday item, we’re prompted to connect Slack to monday, which leads us to an error:

{“error”:“invalid_scope”,“error_description”:“Invalid scope param”}

–
The slack app is installed on our boards, and sending data from monday to slack works successfuly. Also, using the /create-item shortcut on slack works - but integrating this step into slack worfklow is impossible.

This has been going on for at least a couple of months and no fix has been shipped yet. Monday, please fix it🙏

posts.author: robertlaphil (Robert)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please Monday, I beg of you to get this working! I am getting the same error when trying to automate from Slack to Monday.

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Robert, contact Slack support and tell them about the issue - they’ll send you a link to authorize the app and then this will works
